Localization.Description: AXFR request to transfer a zone to an untrusted host. With this request, an attacker can disclose the internal structure of the network.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An AXFR request was made to transfer zone {object.name} to untrusted host {dst.host} from the BIND DNS server on host {event_src.host}
Zone {object.name} was transferred to untrusted host {dst.host} from the BIND DNS server on host {event_src.host}
